recommendations.title: A Haunted House 2
recommendations.overview: After exorcising the demons of his ex, Malcolm starts afresh with his new girlfriend and her two children. After moving into their dream home, Malcolm is once again plagued by bizarre paranormal events.

recommendations.title: Fifty Shades of Black
recommendations.overview: An inexperienced college student meets a wealthy businessman whose sexual practices put a strain on their relationship.

recommendations.title: Naked
recommendations.overview: Following a wild night out with his best man, Rob Anderson wakes up to find himself naked in an elevator on the morning of his wedding day and is forced to relive the morning over and over again.

recommendations.title: A Haunted House
recommendations.overview: Malcolm and Kisha move into their dream home, but soon learn a demon also resides there. When Kisha becomes possessed, Malcolm - determined to keep his sex life on track - turns to a priest, a psychic, and a team of ghost-busters for help in this spo

recommendations.title: The Fighter
recommendations.overview: Boxer "Irish" Micky Ward's unlikely road to the world light welterweight title. His Rocky-like rise was shepherded by half-brother Dicky, a boxer-turned-trainer who rebounded in life after nearly being KO'd by drugs and crime.

recommendations.title: Joy
recommendations.overview: A story based on the life of a struggling Long Island single mom who became one of the country's most successful entrepreneurs.

recommendations.title: Jumanji
recommendations.overview: When siblings Judy and Peter discover an enchanted board game that opens the door to a magical world, they unwittingly invite Alan -- an adult who's been trapped inside the game for 26 years -- into their living room. Alan's only hope for freedom is

recommendations.title: Silver Linings Playbook
recommendations.overview: After losing his job and wife, and spending time in an institution, a former teacher winds up living with his parents. He wants to rebuild his life and reconcile with his wife, but his father would be happy if he shared his obsession with the Philade

recommendations.title: The Marquez-Castillo Siblings
recommendations.overview: A group of four siblings compete for the heritage of their father.

recommendations.title: The Last Song
recommendations.overview: A drama centered on a rebellious girl who is sent to a Southern beach town for the summer to stay with her father. Through their mutual love of music, the estranged duo learn to reconnect.
